content:
Still early in the game (Chapter 3) but I've just been rolling and gathering a roster. I saw a little guide on here about some beginner/early game teams, and I just wanted some suggestions on which team, and characters, to invest in because I think each is fun in its own way.

Aqueors/Chaos because tentacles and some counters are funny.
- Tulu/Ramona/Caecus/Celeste

Chaos/Caro because I like the way Caro plays with the synergy and slight combo style with Embryos
- Helot/Ramona/Faint/Nautila

Chaos/Ultra is just silly. Lotta stuff going on and it's funny to see crits from Jenkin just melt.
- Jenkin/Ramona/Winkle/Erica

Also, secondary question, Is the Ramona: Genesis Form something i should prioritize since it costs 60 standard rolls?

Hi is there a guide to what dupes I need for each team. 
I have E3- Gmurphy, E2- Miryam, E1- Thais, E0 Horla, E0 doresain, E5 Tawil, E3- Gdoll, E2 Hameln, E1 24.

Needing recommendations for the dupes. I was thinking 1 more dupe for thais? Or should I save up for a new person. 

Current teams are - 24 poison comp - miryam, doll and hameln. Doresain - with thais, aigis and horla. Tawil blue comp - with gdoll, hameln, caecus. Needing a team comp with G murphy as well but not sure how to do that. 

Who to get from the free banner too - I was wanting clementine/castor to make a purple team with jenkins/winkle/horla or another dupe of gdoll?
thread_title: Team guidance - Dupe suggestions - General questions

content:
Get Thais to E2 for that -2 arith cost 
You just need one more dupe for Thais then you're done
You can get Castor if you need another team
thread_title: Team guidance - Dupe suggestions - General questions

content: Castor is very good and even does great dps at higher dupes
thread_title: Team guidance - Dupe suggestions - General questions

content: He pairs very well with Jenkins
thread_title: Team guidance - Dupe suggestions - General questions

content: He auto crits when you roused him and Jenkins provides a lot of crit dmg buff from exalt and rouse card
